changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Create Reporting page for Tuberculosis Laboratory notebook

column.name: instructions
column.value: View laboratory performance metrics, turnaround times, positivity rates, and resistance trends. Filter by date range to analyze workflow data.

column.name: content
column.value: Reporting - Analytics and metrics for TB laboratory workflow

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Tuberculosis Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7

changeSet.author: openelis-tb

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.workflow_page_template WHERE id = 207

changeSet.comment: Insert TB Reporting workflow page template

column.name: default_instructions
column.value: View laboratory performance metrics, turnaround times, positivity rates, and resistance trends. Filter by date range to analyze workflow data.

column.name: default_content
column.value: Reporting - Analytics and metrics for TB laboratory workflow
